scripts.deploy: npx expo export --platform web --clear && powershell -Command "$d='dist'; $s='static-assets'; New-Item -Path $d/$s -ItemType Directory -Force; Get-ChildItem -Path $d/assets -Recurse -Include *.ttf,*.png | ForEach-Object { Copy-Item $_.FullName -Destination $d/$s -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Get-ChildItem $d -Recurse -Include *.js,*.html | ForEach-Object { $c = Get-Content $_.FullName -Raw; $c = $c -replace 'assets/src/assets/', '/KognitionsApp/static-assets/'; $c = $c -replace '"/_expo/', '"/KognitionsApp/_expo/'; $c = $c -replace '"/assets/', '"/KognitionsApp/assets/'; $c = $c -replace '"/favicon.ico', '"/KognitionsApp/favicon.ico'; $c = $c -replace 'assets/node_modules/@expo/vector-icons/build/vendor/react-native-vector-icons/Fonts/', '/KognitionsApp/static-assets/'; $c = $c -replace '/KognitionsApp/KognitionsApp/', '/KognitionsApp/'; $c | Set-Content $_.FullName -NoNewline }" && powershell New-Item -Path dist/.nojekyll -ItemType File -Force && gh-pages -d dist
